p: Major capability expansion of the israel_researcher Telegram bot and research pipeline. This session added two new sector agents (Construction, Tourism/Transport), expanded the TechDefense universe from 11 to 21 tickers with detailed sub-sector domain knowledge, introduced three new Q&A tools (top movers, financial deep-dive, stock screening), and refactored shared utilities into models.py to eliminate duplication across the codebase.

ul.li: The bot had no way to answer "what went up most today?" — required a new get_top_movers tool scanning 400-500 TASE stocks.
Financial deep-dives (revenue, profit, EPS history) were not supported — users had to go to external sites.
TechDefense only covered 11 tickers and had no domain knowledge for small-cap defense sub-contractors (ARYT, ASHO, ISHI, CMER, SMSH, ARDM, ELRN).
Construction and Tourism/Transport sectors had no dedicated agents, leaving these companies in the undifferentiated DiscoveryAgent pool.
Helper functions _today(), _fmt_mcap(), fmt_rsi_label(), and the MAYA_SIGNAL_TYPES set were copy-pasted across 4 modules.
Globes and Calcalist direct RSS feeds were dead (0 entries) — news from Israel's two most important financial papers was completely absent.
The sector LLM prompt showed only 5 signals per stock (truncated at top_signals[:5]) — high-quality signals were being dropped silently.
LLM was anchoring scores on pre-computed final_score values; matched_multiplier_pair and earnings_proximity_pts were not exposed.
The bot could hallucinate current stock prices from stale training data — no hard guardrails existed.

tr.td: NEW — ConstructionAgent for 6 tickers (ELTR, DNYA, ASHG, SPEN, SKBN, DIMRI). Sector signals: steel ETF SLX move, BOI rate proxy, government contract tailwind.
NEW — TourismTransportAgent for 5 tickers (ELAL, ISRO, DANH, FTAL, ISRG). Sector signals: US airline peers (DAL/UAL/LUV), hotel peers (HLT/MAR/IHG), WTI oil (fuel cost), geopolitical risk.

Expanded from 11 → 21 tickers. Added ARYT, ASHO, TATT, ISHI, CMER, ARDM, SMSH, ELRN, MTRX, TDRN. Full sub-sector domain knowledge (naval defense, tactical comms, drone/surveillance, defense venture). Defense peer signal now targets all 9 defense tickers, not just ESLT/NXSN.
Moved DIMRI, SPEN, SKBN to Construction sector. Added FOX.TA and DIPL.TA to TelecomConsumer tickers.
Added FOX (Fox-Wizel) and DIPL (Diplomat Holdings) to consumer sub-group.
Replaced inline _fmt_mcap() and _today() with shared imports from models.py.

Added matched_pair and dte_bonus fields to grouped output. Changed top_signals[:5] → all_signals[:15] and detail truncation 120 → 200 chars. Added new fields to to_llm_input(): matched_multiplier_pair, earnings_proximity_pts.

Rewrote sector LLM prompt to explain all new input fields. Added 3 new intent types: top_movers_query, financial_query, screening_query. Added 15 new intent classification examples. Added hard guardrail: LLM must never state current prices from training data. Fixed Q&A chat answer prompt to distinguish last_session vs intraday data.
Replaced duplicate _today(), _fmt_mcap(), is_pseudo_ticker(), is_cache_stale() calls with shared imports from models.py.

Added 3 new tools: get_top_movers, get_financials, screen_stocks. Registered in _TOOL_REGISTRY and _INTENT_REQUIRED_TOOLS. Added 25 known tickers for Tourism, Construction, Consumer sectors. Replaced inline helpers with models.py imports. Fixed day_str to say "last session" vs "today intraday" based on price_data_note. Added price_line to live scan results so "is X moving?" always gets a number.
Minor cleanup — removed duplicate MAYA_TYPES dict in favor of MAYA_SIGNAL_TYPES from models.

Promoted 5 shared utilities to module-level exports: today(), is_pseudo_ticker(), is_cache_stale(), fmt_mcap(), fmt_rsi_label(). Added MAYA_SIGNAL_TYPES frozenset. Fixed is_cache_stale() to use timezone-aware datetime comparison.

Added SECTOR_TICKERS["TourismTransport"] and SECTOR_TICKERS["Construction"]. Expanded TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS with 20+ new tickers. Fixed dead Globes/Calcalist RSS feeds → Google News site: queries. Added TATT.TA to dual-listed mapping. Removed delisted ITRN.TA and KRNT.TA. Added MISH.TA (Mivtach Shamir) to Banks sector. Expanded DeepStockAnalyzer output with 7 valuation fields (P/E trailing/forward, P/B, dividend yield, gross/net margin, D/E).

Added price_data_note field to DeepStockAnalyzer output ("intraday" vs "last_session"). Added refresh_financial_snapshot_cache() for daily screening cache population. Fixed is_cache_stale() to use shared helper.
Wired refresh_financial_snapshot_cache() into the daily cycle.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
# get_top_movers — scans 400-500 TASE tickers via yf.download() batch call def _tool_top_movers(_ticker, state, top_n=10): universe = state.get("tase_universe_cache", {}).get("tickers", []) or TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS df = yf.download(" ".join(universe), period="2d", interval="1d", progress=False, auto_adjust=True, threads=True) close = df["Close"] # pct = (today_close - yesterday_close) / yesterday_close * 100 # Returns top N gainers + top N losers
# get_financials — annual + quarterly income statement + balance sheet def _tool_financials(ticker, _state): tk = yf.Ticker(ticker + ".TA") annual = tk.financials # 4-year income statement quarterly = tk.quarterly_financials # 4-quarter income statement bs = tk.balance_sheet # latest balance sheet
# screen_stocks — reads state["financial_snapshot_cache"] (populated daily) # Returns P/E, P/B, dividend yield, revenue growth, net margin for top 25 by mktCap

# Before: each module had its own copy of these helpers def _today() -> str: return datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d") def _fmt_mcap(cap) -> str: ... # copy-pasted in 4 files def is_pseudo_ticker(s) -> bool: return s.startswith("TASE") # copy-pasted
# After: canonical versions in models.py, imported everywhere from .models import today, is_pseudo_ticker, is_cache_stale, fmt_mcap, fmt_rsi_label, MAYA_SIGNAL_TYPES
# is_cache_stale now timezone-aware: def is_cache_stale(date_str: str, ttl_days: float) -> bool: fetched = datetime.fromisoformat(date_str) age = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - fetched.astimezone(timezone.utc) return age > timedelta(days=ttl_days)

# Before: only 5 signals shown to LLM, detail truncated at 120 chars "top_signals": [{"type": s.signal_type, "headline": s.headline, "detail": s.detail[:120], ...} for s in g["signals"][:5]]
# After: all 15 signals, detail at 200 chars, new explainability fields "all_signals": [{"type": s.signal_type, "headline": s.headline, "detail": s.detail[:200], ...} for s in g["signals"][:15]], "matched_multiplier_pair": ["earnings_calendar", "volume_spike"], # what triggered top multiplier "earnings_proximity_pts": 60, # how urgently earnings are approaching (0/12/25/45/60/70/80)

ul.li: Start python -m israel_researcher and confirm 9 sector agents appear in the cycle log (Banks, TechDefense, Energy, PharmaBiotech, RealEstate, TelecomConsumer, Discovery, Construction, TourismTransport).
Send the bot "what went up most today?" — should trigger get_top_movers and return a ranked table of TASE gainers/losers.
Send "what was Bezeq's revenue last year?" — should trigger get_financials with BEZQ and return annual income statement.
Send "cheapest stock by P/E" — should trigger screen_stocks after the daily cache populates (first cycle of the day).
Verify TechDefense agent scores ARYT or CMER when a maya_contract filing appears for them — small-cap defense bonus (+15) should push them into buy tier.
Check israel_researcher/config.py Globes RSS — confirm articles appear in the news monitor (Google News site: queries should yield items, the old direct feeds were empty).
Ask the bot for a current stock price with no context — confirm it fetches live data rather than hallucinating from training knowledge.
financial_snapshot_cache is empty on first run — screen_stocks returns an error message until the first daily refresh completes. This is intentional (graceful degradation).

get_top_movers uses end-of-day TASE data from Yahoo Finance — it reflects the last completed session, not live intraday prices. The tool output says "today's top movers" which may be yesterday if TASE is closed.

Construction and TourismTransport agents have no sector-specific macro signals yet (the get_sector_signals() stubs return []). They run the standard 8-detector technical scan but have no peer ETF signals. This is a known gap — macro signals will be added in a follow-up.
TATT.TA dual-listed — added to _DUAL_LISTED in TechDefenseAgent. Yahoo Finance may lag on TATT.TA overnight moves vs Nasdaq — verify signal fires correctly.
Google News RSS rate limiting — site: queries for Globes/Calcalist/TheMarker are 3 new feeds. Total RSS feed count increased. Monitor for HTTP 429 in the news monitor log.
DeepStockAnalyzer valuation fields — fetched via tk.info which is a separate HTTP call per ticker. This adds latency to the top-8 analysis phase. If YF rate-limits, fields return None gracefully.
